message:
fix(layout): prevent arithmetic underflow in flex constraint solver

Replace two instances of space_to_distribute - allocated with
saturating_sub to prevent u16 underflow when accumulated minimum-size
allocations exceed available space. Without this fix, the last flex
element could receive a garbage width of ~65535, breaking layout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
